title: NoBlindnessEffect
description: A mod that removes the blindness effect that helps you see more clearly
body:
**Say goodbye to blindness effects in Minecraft!**

This simple yet powerful mod removes the annoying blindness status effect caused by potions, mobs, or environmental triggers, giving you a clearer view of your world at all times. Whether you're exploring caves, battling mobs, or trying out new potions, enjoy uninterrupted vision and enhanced gameplay with No Blindness Mod.
